creator: lysfjord.daniel@smokepit.net
text:
Created attachment 250902
truss -f on service restart (in jail) after update of hyperscan

As summary say; after updating devel/hyperscan to 5.4.2, rspamd fail to start with the following error:

Performing sanity check on rspamd configuration:
cannot allocate scratch space for hyperscan: error code -5
cannot compile url matcher static patterns, fatal error: cannot allocate scratch space for hyperscan: error code -5
Abort trap

Starting rspamd works after downgrading hyperscan to 5.4.0.
